"C:\Users\HP\AppData\Local\Programs\CLion 2025.2.2\bin\cmake\win\x64\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\CS_ASSIGNMENT2_SOUND.dir/objects.a
C:\Users\HP\AppData\Local\Programs\CLION2~1.2\bin\mingw\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\CS_ASSIGNMENT2_SOUND.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\CS_ASSIGNMENT2_SOUND.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\Users\HP\AppData\Local\Programs\CLION2~1.2\bin\mingw\bin\G__~1.EXE -g -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\CS_ASSIGNMENT2_SOUND.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o CS_ASSIGNMENT2_SOUND.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libCS_ASSIGNMENT2_SOUND.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\CS_ASSIGNMENT2_SOUND.dir\linkLibs.rsp
